ham.subject: Scheduled Patch Deployment - Monday, 09:00 AM IST
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that a critical security patch will be deployed to all company workstations on Monday, 9:00 AM IST. During the downtime, the network may experience brief interruptions. Ensure that all unsaved work is backed up before the scheduled window.

If you encounter issues post‑patch, contact the IT Helpdesk at it.support@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
Alex Johnson
IT Operations Manager

spam.subject: Urgent: Suspicious Transaction Detected - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear valued customer,

We have detected an unauthorized transaction on your account exceeding Rs 50,000. To protect your funds, we must verify your identity immediately.

Please click the link below to confirm your account details and prevent suspension of your account:

<URL>

Failure to verify within 24 hours will result in temporary restriction of all services.

Thank you for acting swiftly.

Sincerely,
Bank Customer Assurance Team
